title: Bocchi the Rock! Custom GUI Pack
description: Bocchi the Rock! Custom GUI Pack
body:
**![Preview](https://i.imgur.com/pfOzN5K.png)**



### **Introduction:**

This is a **GUI-only resource pack**, so you can freely use it alongside other resource packs — just place it **on top** of the one you already use.

This pack is themed after *“Bocchi the Rock!”*, featuring a **black, pink, and yellow** palette. I’ve also customized the hot bar and added unique pictures for each container to bring the theme to life.

If you’d like to see other color options in the future — such as **blue & white** or anything else — feel free to share your suggestions, and I’ll consider them.

If you find any bugs, please report them so I can fix them as soon as possible.

**Thank you for your support! ❤️**~~~~
